headlines.headline: Ixenis Outlets to host investor day focused on wireless connectivity strategy

sentiment.reasoning: Investor days are informational events that rarely trigger immediate material financial shifts.

headlines.headline: Ixenis Outlets secures $320M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: A $320M contract provides a clear, quantifiable revenue boost that will likely be recognized over the coming quarters.

headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co reports record quarterly revenue, up 8% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth indicates strong operational momentum and positive market reception.

headlines.headline: Joval Brands misses quarterly revenue estimates by 8%

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% revenue miss is a significant negative indicator of current demand and operational performance.

headlines.headline: Joval Brands announces $1.2B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program signals management confidence and provides immediate support to earnings per share.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
